metadata.title: [zh-tw] Hide Sidebars on Window Resize
metadata.description: Hide Sidebars on Window Resize 繁體中文化與微調
metadata.author: Chico

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Increase this to hide the left sidebar sooner; decrease it to delay hiding
ast.target: 提高此數值會更早隱藏左側邊欄；降低此數值會延後隱藏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Increase this to hide the right sidebar sooner; decrease it to delay hiding
ast.target: 提高此數值會更早隱藏右側邊欄；降低此數值會延後隱藏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide the left sidebar when the window is this narrow
ast.target: 視窗窄到此寬度時隱藏左側邊欄

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide the right sidebar when the window is this narrow
ast.target: 視窗窄到此寬度時隱藏右側邊欄

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show sidebars back when window becomes wide again
ast.target: 視窗再次變寬時重新顯示側邊欄

regex.source: setName("Hide the left sidebar when the window is this narrow")
regex.target: setName("視窗窄到此寬度時隱藏左側邊欄")

regex.source: setDesc("Increase this to hide the left sidebar sooner; decrease it to delay hiding")
regex.target: setDesc("提高此數值會更早隱藏左側邊欄；降低此數值會延後隱藏")

regex.source: setName("Hide the right sidebar when the window is this narrow")
regex.target: setName("視窗窄到此寬度時隱藏右側邊欄")

regex.source: setDesc("Increase this to hide the right sidebar sooner; decrease it to delay hiding")
regex.target: setDesc("提高此數值會更早隱藏右側邊欄；降低此數值會延後隱藏")

regex.source: setName("Show sidebars back when window becomes wide again")
regex.target: setName("視窗再次變寬時重新顯示側邊欄")
